description.value: The branches shade the trunk, the trunk supports the branches. When you or an ally within Close range is attacked, you may move up to your speed towards the attacking creature. If your movement ends with the attacker within your reach (if you are wielding a melee weapon) or within your weapon's first range increment (for a ranged weapon), make an attack roll against a DC equal to the foe's attack roll. If successful, you negate the attack and move the attacking creature 5 feet in any direction, plus 5 additional feet for every 5 initiator levels you possess. If this movement would force a target into hazardous terrain (such as into a hostile magical effect or off a cliff), they may make a Reflex saving throw (DC 12 + your initiation modifier) to end this forced movement before entering that terrain. If the target is sprouted, they must make a successful Reflex saving throw; on a failed save the distance you move them is doubled.
